params.name: Nuclear-Powered Mini Fan
params.description: To enjoy coolness anywhere and anytime during hot summers, the dev team customized this compact fan. Utilizing an internal miniature reactor, it provides a steady and lasting supply of cool air to its user. The only caution is to avoid exposing it to excessive impact.
